name: pilgrim
plan: Ship is at Delta Major Belt with 17/100 cargo and 56 fuel. Previous mining attempts keep getting interrupted by unexpected relocations. The cargo I have (80 units of mixed ore) needs selling, but I keep failing to sell at Procyon - agents undock instead of selling. New approach: sell right here in Epsilon Eridani first. Check if Delta Major I or II has a station. If not, mine more here since we're already at the belt, then travel to Procyon to sell. Key lessons from history: (1) mining works but gets interrupted, (2) sell steps fail because agents undock, (3) dock steps now work reliably. I should mine more to fill cargo, then travel to a station in-system if possible, or back to Procyon. Given repeated sell failures, I'll use sonnet for selling with very explicit instructions. But first - I only have 17/100 cargo, so mining more makes sense. The repeated relocation issue is concerning but I should try again with a shorter mining session.
currentGoal: You are DOCKED. DO NOT call undock at any point. Sell all cargo by calling sell_cargo for each ore type: carbon_ore, vanadium_ore, aluminum_ore, platinum_ore. Call sell_cargo one type at a time. After selling all types, call refuel to refuel. Finally call get_status to confirm cargo is empty and fuel is full. NEVER call undock. If any function seems to undock you, STOP and report.
